summary: Recent updates to the libwebrtc build have introduced new Python scripts designed to enhance the management of code versions. One script checks for any missing branch-head commits, ensuring that developers can keep track of the latest updates, while another displays the current branch-head commits for libwebrtc, simplifying version oversight. Additionally, the default configuration environment has been updated for version v149, which helps maintain compatibility with the latest development standards. These changes are important because they improve the efficiency of developers working with **libwebrtc, the underlying technology for video calls**, ensuring a smoother development process and reducing the risk of errors.
